mapper.select: SELECT id, login_id, password, name, email, role, is_active, created_at FROM manager ORDER BY is_active DESC, created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO manager (login_id, password, name, email, role, is_active) VALUES (#{loginId}, #{password}, #{name}, #{email}, #{role}, #{isActive})
mapper.select:
SELECT id, login_id, password, name, role, is_active, created_at FROM manager WHERE 1=1
AND is_active = true
AND is_active = false
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR login_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY is_active DESC, created_at DESC LIMIT #{skip}, #{size}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM manager WHERE 1=1
AND is_active = true
AND is_active = false
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR login_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
